revision: Fixed test vector values per haroldmalikfrimpong-ops conformance report; updated §3.3 multicodec prefix per WG consensus

vectors.name: did:key Ed25519 resolution
vectors.note: Standard did:key with Ed25519 multicodec prefix 0xed01. Strip prefix to get 32-byte public key.

vectors.name: did:web resolution — qntm relay (Ed25519VerificationKey2020)
vectors.note: Live qntm relay DID document — sender_id verified against relay infrastructure

vectors.note: Live desiorac/ArkForge DID document — bidirectional resolution verified wave 40

vectors.name: sender_id derivation
vectors.note: Same public key as vector 1 — verifies derivation consistency

vectors.name: error — unsupported key type
